get.description:
Get paragraph with full embedded data.

Returns aggregated data from:
- Paragraph base table
- ParagraphAnnotation (speaker, emotion, difficulty, etc.)
- TTSEdit (edit decisions)
- Routing (TTS engine/voice selection)
- Quality (scores, issues, suggestions)

This is the recommended endpoint for frontend detail views.
For list views, use GET /paragraphs/ (limited fields).

Response List Routings Api Routings  Get
Response List Qualities Api Qualities  Get

post.description:
启动项目导出任务.

异步执行导出，返回任务状态。最终产物保存在服务端输出目录。
支持格式: m4b, srt, vtt, m4b_srt, all.

List all audio segments for a book.

In MVP implementation, scans the storage directory for audio files.
Future: query database for segment metadata.

schema.title: Response List Audio Segments Api Audio Segments Book  Book Id  Get

get.description: Get a specific audio segment.

patch.description:
Reorder audio segments.

Creates a new audio file with segments in the specified order.
Uses ffmpeg crossfade for smooth transitions.

post.description:
Trim audio segment to specified range.

Args:
    segment_id: Segment identifier
    request: Trim parameters (start_ms, end_ms)
    book_id: Book identifier (from query param)

Returns:
    Trimmed segment metadata

Merge multiple audio segments into one.

Args:
    request: Merge parameters (segment_ids, optional output_path)
    book_id: Book identifier (from query param)

Returns:
    Merged segment metadata

Chat-based text editing with streaming SSE response.

User selects text and describes editing intent (e.g., "make it more colloquial").
LLM returns streaming edit suggestions with diff preview.

Chat-based annotation adjustment with streaming SSE response.

User describes annotation adjustment (e.g., "this is Zhang San, more angry").
LLM returns streaming annotation suggestions.

Batch annotation suggestions for a chapter.

Scans unannotated paragraphs and suggests annotations.

Global AI assistant for context-aware Q&A.

Answers questions about the project, provides suggestions, and can trigger actions.

get.description:
HTTP fallback for clients that don't support WebSocket.

Returns current pipeline status (polling-based alternative to WebSocket).
TODO: Implement event log / pub-sub system for actual event history.

Get template queue for project.

Templates are confirmed feedback records (processed=true, promoted=true)
that can be applied to other paragraphs.

Filters:
- source: Filter by feedback source (human_edit, quality_judge, user_rating)
- stage: Filter by pipeline stage
- pattern_tag: Filter by specific pattern tag
- pending_only: Only show unprocessed feedback (pending confirmation)

post.description:
Confirm or reject a template.

Confirm: Mark as processed=true, promoted=true (enters Golden Sample candidate queue)
Reject: Mark as processed=true (not promoted)

Apply template to project (batch apply to matching paragraphs).

Scope options:
- all: Apply to all paragraphs in project
- chapter: Apply to specific chapters
- pattern: Apply to paragraphs matching pattern_tag

Returns a task ID for progress tracking (applied asynchronously).

get.description:
Get progress of template application task.

Returns progress from in-memory tracking.

Get HARNESS self-iteration status overview.

Queries real data from the SelfIterationLoop (if running) and
the FeedbackRecord table for unprocessed counts.

Get feedback funnel metrics.

Shows: total → analyzed → triggered upgrade → promotion passed → published
Aggregated from FeedbackRecord table.

Get pattern tag frequency heatmap.

Aggregates pattern_tags from processed FeedbackRecord entries.

Get prompt version evolution timeline per stage.

Queries VersionStore for prompt version history from the prompts/ directory.

Get promotion gate dashboard (4 hard criteria).

Evaluates the latest prompt versions through PromotionGate.

Get active canary releases dashboard.

Shows traffic %, samples collected, quality ratio, rollback thresholds.

Get A/B test results dashboard.

Derives A/B test metrics from feedback data grouped by stage and version.
Since A/B tests run in-memory, we provide the latest results from
the promotion gate evaluation.

Get latest Critics Ensemble evaluation results.

Returns ensemble of 3 critics (semantic/structural/objective) with weighted verdict.
If no quality-checked paragraphs exist, returns default empty state.

post.description:
Manually trigger self-iteration loop.

Creates a SelfIterationLoop for the project if needed and triggers
immediate analysis of unprocessed feedback.

get.description:
Get complete HARNESS dashboard (all metrics in one call).

Aggregates real data from all subsystems.

post.description:
Rollback prompt version for a stage.

Parses the target version (e.g. "v2" -> 2) and performs rollback
via VersionStore. This is a destructive operation.

get.description:
Browse golden samples by stage.

Shows input + expected_output + human_verified + quality_score.
Get specific golden sample details.

post.description:
Contribute template to golden dataset.

Loads the FeedbackRecord by ID and extracts its input_snapshot + corrected_output
as the golden sample's input/output pair. The rationale is stored as metadata.

Approve a pending golden sample contribution.

Sets human_verified=true in the sample JSON file.
Reject a pending golden sample contribution — marks rejected and removes from active set.

Trigger golden dataset regression test.

For each golden sample, runs the stage through run_stage() with the sample's input,
then compares actual output against expected_output using similarity scoring.
A sample passes if similarity >= 0.7.

This is used by Promotion Gate to validate prompt upgrades.

get.description:
Get historical regression pass_rate trend.

Reads saved regression reports from tests/golden/reports/ and
returns pass_rate over time for tracking prompt quality evolution.

post.description:
Trigger DSPy Bootstrap Few-shot optimization.

Selects optimal subset of golden samples as few-shot examples
using multi-objective Pareto optimization.

Args:
- stage: Which stage to optimize
- max_samples: Maximum few-shot examples to select
- optimization_target: "diversity", "coverage", or "accuracy"

Start one-click auto-run pipeline.

Executes complete pipeline from text to audiobook with:
- Configurable difficulty/voice/cost preferences
- Auto quality regeneration
- Pause points for intervention
- Real-time WebSocket progress

Returns run_id for tracking.

get.description:
Get auto-run pipeline status.

If run_id not provided, returns latest run.

post.description: Pause auto-run pipeline at next safe point.
Resume paused auto-run pipeline.
Cancel auto-run pipeline.

get.description:
View intermediate product from a pipeline stage.

Allows user to inspect results before continuing.

Stage products:
- extract: Raw text chunks
- analyze: Character list, emotion curve
- annotate: Speaker/emotion annotations
- edit: TTS edit decisions
- audio_postprocess: Audio parameters
- synthesize: Audio segments
- quality: Quality scores and issues

Useful for prototyping new endpoints before defining them explicitly.

get.description:
Get available TTS voices by engine.

Returns comprehensive voice list for frontend dropdown selection.

Query parameters:
- include_unavailable: Whether to include unavailable engines
- language: Filter by language (e.g., 'zh-CN', 'en-US')
- gender: Filter by gender (male/female/neutral)

Response includes:
- Engine availability status
- Voice list with metadata
- Default engine/voice recommendations

Get recommended voices for a specific context.

Args:
    context: Context hint ('narration', 'dialogue', 'female_character', 'male_character')
    language: Language filter

Returns:
    List of recommended voices for the context

Preview a voice with sample text.

Returns:
    Audio preview URL or synthesized audio data
